title: Light Mediterranean Marsbar Crumble
description: A playful, salty crumble that blends the salty crunch of a Mars Bar with fresh Mediterranean flavors for a low-sodium snack or dessert.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and whisk together the almond flour, rolled oats, chopped almonds, honey, olive oil, dried figs, and sea salt in a bowl until crumbly.
Fold in the broken Mars Bar pieces until evenly distributed throughout the crumble mixture.
Spread the mixture evenly onto a greased baking sheet or small oven-safe dish.
Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the crumble feels firm to the touch.
Remove from the oven and allow to cool for a few minutes before breaking into pieces.
Serve warm as a dessert or a crunchy snack alongside a cup of herbal tea or a glass of white wine.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 3 days.
Reheat briefly in a 350-degree oven for 2 minutes if desired before serving.
